summary: No-ship: the MCP source-of-truth fix still has defensible correctness holes around legacy unioning and sandbox path derivation.

findings.title: Legacy mcp.json can still resurrect stale servers
findings.recommendation: Do not union legacy-only names after a successful ~/.claude.json read. Treat ~/.claude.json as authoritative when it is readable, and only fall back to ~/.claude/mcp.json when the real source is absent/unreadable or in an explicit migration path; otherwise stale non-duplicate legacy entries are reported as live MCP servers.

findings.title: claudeJsonPath silently reads outside sandboxes not shaped as <tmp>/.claude
findings.recommendation: Validate/document that home must be a .claude directory, or require GARRISON_CLAUDE_JSON for nonstandard sandboxes. As written, any caller setting/passing GARRISON_CLAUDE_HOME=<tmp> resolves <parent>/.claude.json, silently missing the sandboxed config and falling back to legacy mcp.json.
